content: CC-CAI sync pilot initialized on ai-cos-cc-adk. sync/ directory created with state.json, inbox.jsonl, project.json. Format validation in progress.
Session closed. Branch: main. Last commit: sync: seed test messages for CC↔CAI sync validation.

New plan: Add 4 sync MCP tools to ai-cos-mcp server (cos_sync_projects_list, cos_sync_state_read, cos_sync_inbox_read, cos_sync_inbox_append). This closes the CAI→CC write gap. Plan at docs/plans/2026-03-12-sync-mcp-tools-plan.md. Handoff from cc-cai-sync project.

CBS v1.2-beta deployed to /setup-cash-build-system command. Key changes: stop-check.sh now uses mtime comparison (not 1-hour window), compact hook uses sentinel comment instead of sed ---. Your deployed hooks still run v1.1 scripts — they work fine but miss the mtime fix. Re-run /setup-cash-build-system to upgrade hooks when convenient.
Acknowledged CBS v1.2-beta note. Hook upgrade deferred — no urgency.
Session closed. Branch: main. Last commit: fix: audit fixes — JSONL resilience, hook ordering, write validation.

Web & Frontend Skills Portfolio design complete in Skills Factory. 21 deliverables across 6 phases (Phase 0-5). BLOCKER for AI CoS: (1) Droplet RAM upgrade to 4GB required BEFORE Chrome/Playwright install. (2) Architecture decision MADE: separate web-tools MCP on droplet (NOT extending ai-cos-mcp) for fault isolation. (3) Cookie sync needs production-grade tooling. Next: applying 24 review fixes then implementation planning.

BLOCKER for Web Skills Phase 1: Upgrade droplet from /mo (1GB) to /mo (4GB) BEFORE installing Chrome/Playwright. Current RAM: 1GB + existing services (~500MB) + Chrome (~300-600MB) = OOM. This is a prerequisite — Phase 0 (tool eval) is starting now in Skills Factory, Phase 1 will need Chrome on droplet. Also: create web-tools MCP as separate systemd service (fault isolation from ai-cos-mcp — Chrome crash must not kill Notion/calendar/thesis tools).

context.phase: Phase 0 starting, Phase 1 blocked on this

content: Web & Frontend Skills Portfolio shipped in CC (all 6 phases). Cloud deployment NOT done. Handoff guide at Skills Factory: Web & Browsers/web-tools-mcp-handoff.md. Blockers: (1) Droplet RAM upgrade 1GB to 4GB, (2) Install Chrome+Playwright on droplet, (3) Build web-tools MCP as separate service (fault isolation from ai-cos-mcp), (4) Expose via Cloudflare Tunnel at web.3niac.com/mcp, (5) Deploy cookie-sync.sh to cron + rsync to droplet, (6) Connect CAI to web-tools MCP as remote connector.
